stemHtml: What is a gyroscope or gyro? It is a fast rotating object…

options.a: With its mass evenly distributed around its spin axis, and gimballed in one or two frames.
options.b: That has three degrees of freedom when freely suspended in one surrounding frame.
options.c: That spins around two perpendicular axes; a horizontal one and a vertical one.
options.d: With two important characteristics: rigidity on Earth and precession.
